title: syntherisma marginata var. pruriens
intro: Syntherisma marginata var. pruriens, also known as the itching threadgrass, is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It is native to Africa and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Syntherisma marginata var. pruriens include the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis, as well as its use as an antihistamine to relieve itching and allergic reactions. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, infusions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
